visa_types.name: Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)]
Application fees applicable for Latvia in 2025
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid only by cash in THB.
Exemption of Visa Fee:
																		
- Students who are participating in exchange program
- Students who apply for study visa of master/ doctoral degree
- Applicants of voluntary work/ OCMA decision under 16 years old
Please Note:
																		
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from
Additional Services (http://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/lva/additional-services)
tab.
- All charges at Visa Application Centre are to be paid in cash only in Thai Baht.
visa_types.processing_time:
The embassy makes a decision on the application for a visa within 15 days from the date of receipt of the application and the documents necessary for issuing a visa. The period for making
                                                                        a decision on a visa application may be extended up to 60 calendar days in individual cases, in particular when an additional verification of the application is required.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the provisions of the Immigration Law of Latvia (Section 32.) A foreigner shall submit documents for requesting a residence permit to a representation, which is not located in a Schengen Agreement country. It means, those, who intend to apply for the residence permit in Latvia, and currently reside in Vietnam MUST submit their residence permit applications directly to the Consular Section of the Embassy by making an appointments on our customer’s online registration system https://pieraksts.mfa.gov.lv/en/china (https://pieraksts.mfa.gov.lv/en/china) in advance. Timeslots are available for such reservation of a visit to the Embassy (weekly from Tuesday to Thursday, from 9:30 till 11:30, except the holidays) on above mentioned webpage.
Only when the positive decision in residence permit case will be made by the Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs (letter in Latvian from the OCMA received by the applicant), those applicants may submit the documents for the long-stay visas via VFS to travel to Latvia and receive an actual Residence Permit card. Just to underline foreigners aiming to receive the residence permit of Latvia residing outside the Schengen Agreement countries submit their residence permit application documents from abroad ONLY (in Thailand case - the Embassy of Latvia in China) and wait for the OCMA decision.
Above mentioned applies to all applicants who have the Residence Permit invitation instead of a regular long-stay visa invitation.
																		
- STUDY/VOLUNTARY WORK
- OCMA DECISION
